300.$description: Brand identity color. Non-interactive — visual collision with danger.
Action and interactive primary. CTA color. Distinct from brand.
Decorative accent. Emphasis, illustration, data visualization.
Default for links and focus ring.

subtle.$description: Subtle background for grouped or nested sections.

overlay.$description: Backdrop scrim for modals and overlays.

brand.$description: Brand identity surface. Layout-level only. Pair with text.on.solid.brand.

icon.$description: Default icon fill. Separate slot to allow independent icon theming.

primary.$description: Verify contrast against resolved cyan value.

brand.$description: Decorative brand border. Not a semantic signal.
